description: Write comprehensive test documentation (TEST_PLAN.md) covering all 28 tools with operations and expected results
steps: Read all tool definitions in backend/app/agents/tools/definitions.py
Read all validators in backend/app/agents/validation.py
Read all pre-processor patterns in backend/app/agents/pre_processing/
Document each tool with: operation, expected result, verification method
Cover the category consolidation (excretion->abnormal, vaccine/deworming->medical)
Write TEST_PLAN.md in tests/e2e/ with bilingual test cases (zh/en)
Verify document matches actual code behavior

description: Fix all failing unit tests caused by category consolidation and other changes
steps: Run pytest tests/ --ignore=tests/e2e -v and identify all failures
Fix test_vaccine_detection: category 'vaccine' -> 'medical'
Fix test_build_emergency_hint: update assertion to match new hint text
Fix test_english_system_prompt_has_no_chinese: handle CJK examples in quotes
Fix test_request_logging: check extra dict instead of message string
Fix all references to old categories (vaccine, excretion, deworming) in test files
Run full test suite and confirm 0 failures

description: Add new unit tests for category consolidation coverage
steps: Add test_diarrhea_is_abnormal: '拉稀' -> abnormal (was excretion)
Add test_deworming_is_medical: '驱虫' -> medical (was deworming)
Add test_swimming_is_daily: '游泳' -> daily (new pattern)
Add test_removed_categories_rejected: excretion/vaccine/deworming fail validation
Add test_new_category_set: daily/diet/medical/abnormal all pass validation
Run pytest and confirm all new tests pass

description: Add E2E test cases for merged categories (2.8-2.10)
steps: Add test messages 2.8 (diarrhea), 2.9 (deworming), 2.10 (swimming) to test_messages.py
Add test_2_8_diarrhea_is_abnormal E2E test
Add test_2_9_deworming_is_medical E2E test
Add test_2_10_swimming_is_daily E2E test
Verify E2E test structure matches existing patterns (parametrized zh/en)

description: Run E2E tests against live backend and fix tool-not-called failures
steps: Start backend server: uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
Run pytest tests/e2e/ -v --tb=short
Identify which tools LLM fails to call (search_places, set_language, etc.)
Improve tool descriptions/system prompt to increase call rate
Re-run E2E tests and compare pass rate with previous report (was 71%)
Update latest_report.md with new results

description: Fix emergency SSE event not being emitted in E2E tests
steps: Run test_tool_emergency.py E2E tests
Check if emergency detection triggers correctly in agents/emergency.py
Verify SSE event emission path: detect_emergency -> build_emergency_hint -> orchestrator
Check if emergency SSE event is emitted via on_card callback
Fix the event emission path if broken
Re-run E2E emergency tests and confirm 11.1/11.2 pass

description: Fix multi-event splitting (2.7: walk+bath should create 2 records)
steps: Analyze why '遛了狗还洗了澡' only produces 1 record card
Check pre_processor multi-event splitter regex (_MULTI_EVENT_SPLITTER)
Check orchestrator PATH C multi-task handling
Fix splitting logic or prompt to encourage LLM to call tool twice
Re-run test_2_7_multi_event and confirm >= 2 cards

description: Fix search_places tool not being called (9.1-9.2)
steps: Run E2E tests 9.1/9.2 with location payload
Check if location is properly passed from chat router to orchestrator
Verify search_places tool definition includes proper description
Check if LLM receives location context in system prompt
Fix location passthrough or tool description
Re-run search tests

description: Fix set_language tool not being called (12.1-12.2)
steps: Run E2E tests 12.1/12.2
Check if 'switch to English' and '切换成中文' trigger set_language
Verify tool_decision_tree has clear guidance for language switching
Check pre-processor misc_detect.py for language switching patterns
Fix detection or prompt guidance
Re-run language tests

description: Fix multi-intent splitting (20.4: record+reminder should produce 2 cards)
steps: Analyze test 20.4: '记录吃了狗粮+提醒明天打疫苗' only 1 card
Check if LLM calls multiple tools for multi-intent messages
Check orchestrator PATH C multi-task detection
Improve system prompt or pre-processor to split intents
Re-run test_edge_cases and confirm 20.4 produces >= 2 cards

description: Add missing validators for new tools (add_event_location, search_places_text, request_images, set_language)
steps: Check validation.py for registered validators vs tool definitions
Add validator for add_event_location (event_id UUID, location_name, lat/lng)
Add validator for search_places_text (query required)
Add validator for request_images (reason required)
Add validator for set_language (language enum zh/en)
Add unit tests for each new validator
Run full test suite

description: Run audit checks and fix card type inconsistency
steps: Run audit/check_logic_consistency.py
Fix backend sending 'image_url' and 'text' card types that iOS doesn't handle
Verify all card types emitted by backend are handled by iOS ChatService
Add missing card type handling or remove unused card types
Run audit again and confirm clean

description: Alembic migration for EventCategory enum change
steps: Check if DB enum still contains old values (excretion, vaccine, deworming)
Create alembic migration to update EventCategory enum
Handle existing data: migrate excretion->abnormal, vaccine->medical, deworming->medical
Test migration with alembic upgrade head
Test migration rollback with alembic downgrade
Verify calendar events with old categories still query correctly

description: Remove dead imports and unused code flagged by audit
steps: Fix 13 unused imports flagged in audit report
Run ruff or flake8 to verify no lint errors remain
Run full test suite to confirm no regressions
Commit cleanup
